task_completion.description: Verify the document header is configured with the correct text and formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Westview Academy' (centered, bold, larger font) and 'Physics 301 - Unit 3: Work and Energy' (centered) at the top of the document in OpenOffice Writer.

task_completion.description: Verify the student details area is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Name:', 'Date:', and 'Period:' (or similar fields) below the header area.

task_completion.description: Verify the 4 questions from the draft are present in the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text of 4 distinct physics questions populating the main body of the document.

task_completion.description: Verify that math formula codes have been converted into proper mathematical formula objects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for properly formatted OpenOffice Math objects (e.g., fractions like 1/2, subscripts, superscripts like v^2, Greek letters like Delta) instead of raw text codes like '{1} over {2}' or 'W_{net}'.

task_completion.description: Verify the roller coaster image is inserted under Question 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graphical image of a roller coaster placed specifically after the text of Question 3.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window or a 'Save As' dialog to confirm the file is named 'Physics_Unit3_Exam.odt'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenOffice Writer interface being actively used (menus, toolbars, cursor), rather than just terminal commands generating an .odt file.

integrity.description: Verify the formulas are actual OpenOffice Math objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenOffice Math equation editor interface appearing in at least one screenshot, proving the agent didn't just paste images of formulas from the web.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the provided image file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inserted image should be the specific roller coaster PNG from the Documents folder, not a generic placeholder or an image downloaded from the internet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The draft file is located at /home/ga/Documents/exam_draft.txt and the image is at /home/ga/Documents/roller_coaster.png. The final document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/Physics_Unit3_Exam.odt. The document must contain exactly 3 rendered math formula objects corresponding to the codes in the draft (Kinetic Energy: K = 1/2 m v^2, Work-Energy Theorem: W_net = Delta K, Gravitational Potential Energy: U_g = m g h). The header must include 'Westview Academy', 'Physics 301', and 'Work and Energy'.
